characters.name: Ashley Burke
characters.description: Ashley BurkeBiographyFull NameAshley BurkeBirthdayJune 13, 1986GenderFemaleRelativesMary-Kate Burke(sister)Kevin Burke(father)Matt Burke(uncle)Jen Burke(mother)Series InformationSeasons1Episodes22Portrayed byAshley OlsenAshley Burkeis a main character in theTwo of a Kindseries. She is the older twin sister and best friend ofMary-Kate Burke. She is portrayed byAshley Olsen. Ashley is the complete opposite of her twin. She loves shopping, boys, and being popular. She is the girly girl twin whileMary Kateis the sporty one. She is the daughter ofKevin Burkeand her deceased motherJen. She hates sports and is the more popular twin, being best friends with Jennifer Dilber. She is very protective over her sister. She doesn't get along very well with her sister, and she lovesCarrievery much and loves her ideas, who is also like a big sister to the two girls. Ashley is the complete opposite of her twin. characters.name: Carrie Moore
characters.description: Carrie MooreBiographyAliasesCarrie(by everyone)GenderFemaleCarrie Mooreis a main character in theABCfamily sitcomTwo of a Kind. She is the 26 year old babysitter ofMary-KateandAshley Burke. She is portrayed bySally Wheeler. She has traveled throughout the world, went to baseball camp, and is the girls "big sister". She dated Matt, Rick, and might like Kevin. She is now in South America and got an A in Kevins semester class. She has a weakness for guys with great chins. characters.name: Kevin Burke
characters.description: Kevin BurkeBiographyFull NameKevin BurkeBirthdaySeptember 13, 1969GenderMaleRelativesMary-Kate Burke(daughter)Ashley Burke(daughter)Matt Burke(brother)unknown wife (deceased)OccupationCollege ProfessorSeries InformationSeasons1Episodes22FirstPutting Two N Two TogetherLastKevin Burke's Day OffPortrayed byChristopher SieberKevin Burkeis the father of Mary-Kate and Ashley Burke he is very protective over his daughters and wants to look after them properly and spend more time with them Carrie kisses when she goes away for the summer he is the husband of Jen Burke he misses his wife dearly and will never forget her.

characters.name: Mary-Kate Burke
characters.description: Mary-Kate BurkeBiographyFull NameMary-Kate BurkeBirthdayJune 13, 1986StatusSingleGenderFemaleRelativesAshley Burke(sister)Kevin Burke(father)Matt Burke(uncle)Jen Burke(deceased)Series InformationSeasons1Episodes22FirstPutting Two N Two TogetherLastKevin Burke's Day OffPortrayed byMary-Kate OlsenMary-Kate Burke, portrayed byMary-Kate Olsenis daughter ofKevin Burkeand a Mother Jen, who died when she was in the third grade. She is the younger twin sister of Ashley Burke and has a crush on Jeremy. She is the sporty twin and likes to watch action movies. She gets annoyed by her sister's overprotectiveness she doesn't have any female friends apart from her sister. She loves Carrie very much because she thinks it's like a having a big sister around.
